object_a.label: window
object_a.description: large window with blinds and curtains on right wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: A sizable rectangular window fitted with horizontal blinds and light-colored curtains/panels. Allows daylight into the room from the right side, brightening the living area; curtains appear grey or neutral and pulled to the sides.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly behind the recliner and to the right of the fireplace/TV assembly
